trait.name: Description
trait.text:
Kobolds are small, cunning, and deeply tied to dragons, believing themselves to be distant kin to these mighty creatures. While often underestimated, their ingenuity, resilience, and natural affinity for magic make them far more capable than their size suggests. Many kobolds revere dragons as deities, while others seek to carve out their own legends, proving their worth through intellect, craftiness, or sheer determination.
Source: Sewage Orc

trait.name: Skill Proficiency
trait.text: You gain proficiency in one of the following skills of your choice: Arcana, Investigation, Medicine, Sleight of Hand, or Survival.

trait.name: Draconic Cry
trait.text: As a bonus action, you let out a piercing cry that unsettles your foes. Until the start of your next turn, allies have advantage on attack rolls against any enemies within 10 feet of you that can hear you. You can use this trait once, regaining all expended uses when you finish a long rest. Additionally you regain all expended uses whenever you roll for initiative.

trait.name: Defiance
trait.text: You have advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

trait.name: Draconic Sorcery
trait.text:
You have a spark of draconic magic within you. When you create your kobold you learn one cantrip of your choice from the following list:
• Fire Bolt • Ray of Frost • Thunderclap
You always have this cantrip prepared. When you cast a spell using this trait, you choose Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma as your spellcasting ability (choose the ability when you create your Kobold).

trait.name: Description
trait.text:
Kobolds are small, cunning, and deeply tied to dragons, believing themselves to be distant kin to these mighty creatures. While often underestimated, their ingenuity, resilience, and natural affinity for magic make them far more capable than their size suggests. Many kobolds revere dragons as deities, while others seek to carve out their own legends, proving their worth through intellect, craftiness, or sheer determination.
Source: Sewage Orc

trait.name: Skill Proficiency
trait.text: You gain proficiency in one of the following skills of your choice: Arcana, Investigation, Medicine, Sleight of Hand, or Survival.

trait.name: Flight
trait.text: You have a flying speed equal to your walking speed.

trait.name: Draconic Cry
trait.text: As a bonus action, you let out a piercing cry that unsettles your foes. Until the start of your next turn, allies have advantage on attack rolls against any enemies within 10 feet of you that can hear you. You can use this trait once, regaining all expended uses when you finish a long rest. Additionally you regain all expended uses whenever you roll for initiative.

trait.name: Defiance
trait.text: You have advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition.
